Off Calendar Apr-25-2016 Off Calendar

Plaintiff Unifund Ccr, Llc, Successor-In-Interest To Pride Acquisitions, Llcs Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-21-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840

Sydney E. Fairbairn, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, UNIFUND CCR, LLC, AS SUCCESSOR-IN-INTEREST TO PRIDE ACQUISITIONS, LLC,
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file,
No appearance by defaulted defendant GLENN A. KINARD, an individual,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:
Damages: $25,882.20
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $110.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $25,992.20

Judgment signed in open court.
